I think: I see a strong promise, but I do not yet see the actual curriculum, lesson quality, or proof of outcomes.
My reaction: I am interested but skeptical; the page feels more like a pitch than evidence I can learn from.
Idea: Show one full sample roadmap with the first lesson, projects, time estimates, and finished learner outcome.
Life-cost decision: Spending 1 month of life is worth it only to inspect a sample roadmap or first lesson, because that directly serves becoming genuinely capable.
Truth assessment: My honest judgment is that this could be useful, but I am only 55% confident because the visible screen gives claims instead of concrete learning material.
